embedder: nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5 (new default, loaded live on all roots)

gpt-oss:120b.terminal: OPERATIONAL CRASH mid-run (finding F1) after 51429 tokens

P3.statement: verify_root zero violations AND logged tokens <= 60000 per run
P3.diagnostic: TokenMeter blocks the NEXT call once total >= budget, so the final in-flight call overshoots the ceiling (here by 1.45% and 0.10%). Documented design, but it makes 'budget-matched arms' soft by up to one call's max_tokens; budget-matching claims in Tier 2/3 must state tolerance or the meter needs a pre-reservation mode.

P5.statement: neural embedder loads live, no fallback, novelty series complete

F1.summary: gpt-oss:120b emitted a countercondition with an empty string; the reply passed the wire schema (item-level lengths unconstrained) and crashed proposal_envelope during compilation, outside the repair loop, killing the run with an unhandled ValidationError (workloads/text.py:144).
F1.containment_violated: model output must never crash the loop
F1.fix: two layers, committed with this report: wire schema now mirrors the envelope constraint (empty countercondition strings are schema-invalid and route through ordinary repair), and the conj rule gains a compile-or-skip backstop with a logged proposal-envelope-invalid measure. Regression tests in tests/test_live_smoke_regressions.py.
F1.post_fix_rerun: runs/live-smoke-gptoss-postfix; outcome recorded in the prereg result block (labeled post-fix, not part of the pre-registered verdicts)
